meaning: n.[植]柏科树的,柏木属植物(原产北美、欧、亚),柏树枝(用作哀悼的标志)
examples: The pine and the cypress remain green all the year round.
One is a Bald Cypress and the other a Southern Magnolia.
Cypress Semiconductor this morning warned that Q4 financial results will fall short of previous estimates.
That lawsuit even claims two former U.S. attorneys conspired with Cypress to hide the theft.
